_note: Status 'mapped' means the component has been mapped to this criterion based on internal review. It does not constitute a formal accessibility audit. All statuses must be verified by an independent auditor before overall_status can be changed.

criteria.title: Non-text Content
criteria.evidence: The Link component contains visible text content as its accessible name. No non-text content (images, icons) exists in the current manifest. When icons are added in future, aria-hidden='true' on the icon wrapper will be required.

criteria.title: Use of Color
criteria.evidence: Inline mode (.link--inline) adds text-decoration underline to ensure links are distinguishable from surrounding text by more than color alone. For standalone (non-inline) links, context and placement must provide sufficient distinction. Hovered state adds underline, providing non-color change on hover.

criteria.title: Contrast (Minimum)
criteria.evidence: Primary default: #1B8354 on white = ~5.27:1 (passes 4.5:1). Primary visited: #14573A on white = ~8.5:1 (passes). Primary hovered: #54C08A on white = ~2.7:1 — note this is below 4.5:1. Primary pressed: #88D8AD on white = ~1.9:1 — below threshold (transient state, brief interaction). Neutral default: #384250 on white = ~9.1:1. Disabled: #9DA4AE exempt per WCAG 1.4.3 inactive UI exception. On-color: contrast depends on background — context-dependent.
criteria.notes: Primary hovered and pressed colors may not meet contrast requirements. These are transient interaction states. Flag for design review.

criteria.title: Non-text Contrast
criteria.evidence: Focus ring: --Border-border-black (#161616) provides ~19.6:1 contrast on white. On-color focus ring --Border-border-white is context-dependent.

criteria.title: Keyboard
criteria.evidence: Native <a href> is keyboard operable by default (Enter key activates, Tab for focus). Disabled links use tabindex='-1' to remove from tab order. External link pattern uses standard anchor behavior.

criteria.title: Link Purpose (In Context)
criteria.evidence: The component renders whatever text content is provided. Meaningful link text is a deployment concern. The audit rule LNK-A11Y-007 checks for generic link text patterns ('click here', 'read more') but cannot enforce meaningful context.

criteria.title: Focus Visible
criteria.evidence: Focus ring is implemented via outline: 2px solid on :focus-visible. Suppression via outline:none or visibility:hidden is caught by LNK-A11Y-006.

criteria.title: Name, Role, Value
criteria.evidence: Native <a> element provides role='link' by default. Text content provides the accessible name. aria-disabled='true' communicates disabled state. External links should add aria-label or visually hidden text to communicate target behavior.

criteria.title: Link must render as native anchor element
criteria.evidence: Component contract requires <a> element. No role overrides permitted.

criteria.title: Link styles must use component token variables
criteria.evidence: link.css uses --Link-link-* component-level tokens. No hardcoded hex or rgba values in base selectors.

criteria.title: Disabled links must not receive keyboard focus
criteria.evidence: Template requires tabindex='-1' on aria-disabled links. LNK-A11Y-003 audits this.

criteria.title: External links must communicate new-tab behavior
criteria.evidence: Contract documents the external link pattern. Cannot be enforced at component CSS level — deployment responsibility.

variant_compliance_notes.concern: Color #54C08A on white = ~2.7:1. Below WCAG 1.4.3 threshold of 4.5:1 for normal text. Transient state — brief user interaction.
variant_compliance_notes.recommendation: Flag for design review. Consider darkening hovered token or accepting as transient state exception.

variant_compliance_notes.concern: Color #88D8AD on white = ~1.9:1. Below threshold. Very transient (while mouse/touch held).
variant_compliance_notes.recommendation: Accept as transient pressed state. Document for design awareness.

variant_compliance_notes.concern: --Border-border-white (#FFF) focus ring contrast depends on the color of the background behind the link. Cannot be guaranteed at component level.
variant_compliance_notes.recommendation: Document as deployment responsibility. On-color links should only be used on backgrounds with sufficient contrast against white.
